title: InstantiateMsg
description: Message for instantiating the CCTP adapter contract

admins.description: The config admins who can update the config and manage chains/depositors/executors

denom.description: The single token denom this adapter handles (i.e. the USDC token denom)

ibc_default_timeout_seconds.description: Default IBC timeout in seconds for Noble transfers

initial_chains.description: Initial chain configurations with allowed destination addresses (can be empty array)

initial_depositors.description: Initial depositors to register during instantiation (can be empty array)

initial_executors.description: Initial executors who can perform operations (can be empty array)

noble_transfer_channel_id.description: IBC transfer channel ID from Neutron to Noble

destination_domain.description: CCTP destination domain identifier. See the full list here: https://developers.circle.com/cctp/v1/supported-domains

evm_destination_caller.description: EVM destination caller address (i.e. Skip's relayer address on destination EVM chain)

noble_fee_recipient.description: Noble fee recipient address (i.e. Skip's relayer address on Noble)

noble_receiver.description: Noble receiver address for CCTP transfers (i.e. Noble Orbiter module address)

chain_id.description: Chain ID; Our internal identifier for the destination EVM chain. Not used for CCTP bridging.

DepositorCapabilities.description: Depositor capabilities for the CCTP adapter

can_withdraw.description: Whether this depositor can withdraw funds

DestinationAddress.description: Destination address information for EVM chains

InitialChainConfig.description: Initial chain configuration with allowed destination addresses

initial_allowed_destination_addresses.description: Initial allowed destination addresses for this chain

capabilities.description: Optional capabilities for this depositor (typed, not Binary) If not provided, defaults to { can_withdraw: true }
